properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v4 v6 v3 v7 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I searched through the Earth for something that could satisfy A peace for the hurt I had buried deep inside Knees on the floor, I finally found everything I needed You lifted my soul and opened up my eyes

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I never knew anything lasts forever Till I found You, till I found You I never dreamed anything could be better Till I found You, till I found You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're rewriting my story And I'm brand new like a morning Oh, I never knew anything lasts forever Till I found You Till I, till I found You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Till I, till I found You Till I, till I found You Till I, till I found You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Gone are the days I'm chasing after what won't last I'm done with building these castles that crumble like sand Oh, knees on the floor I finally found that everything I needed was always right in front of me You gave me a name You changed everything, yeah yeah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I never knew anything lasts forever Till I found You, till I found You I never dreamed anything could be better Till I found You, till I found You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Till I, till I found You Till I, till I found You Till I, till I found You Till I, till I
